list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Merge branch 'prabu_lms' of https://github.com/Ft-Trumio/JAVA_LMS_3_repo into Abhishek_lms

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Application.LoanManagementSystemApplication.executor": "Run", "JUnit.LoanManagementSystemApplicationTests.executor": "Run", "Maven.loan-management-app "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "Abhishek__lms",
